case_results.description: Single-entity canonical traversal for MercadoLibre. Exercises the canonical → cluster → mention → claim path for a well-known organization that may appear under multiple surface forms.
case_results.expected_shape: At least one row with canonical_entity='MercadoLibre', one or more distinct cluster values, and claims with role='subject' or role='object'. The canonical path should return a single canonical_entity value with claims deduplicated across surface-form variants.
failure_modes: canonical_rows empty — CanonicalEntity not present or ALIGNED_WITH edges missing
lower_layer_rows shows cluster with zero claims — participation stage gap
fragmentation_detected — cluster-name path returns more clusters than canonical

canonical_rows.claim_text: MercadoLibre acquired Kangu to expand its logistics footprint.
SoftBank invested in MercadoLibre.
MercadoLibre Inc. launched its shipping and fulfillment unit Mercado Envios.
Andreessen Horowitz backed MercadoLibre Inc. in its Series D.

cluster_rows.claim_text: MercadoLibre acquired Kangu to expand its logistics footprint.
SoftBank invested in MercadoLibre.
MercadoLibre Inc. launched its shipping and fulfillment unit Mercado Envios.
Andreessen Horowitz backed MercadoLibre Inc. in its Series D.
MercadoLibre was frequently cited as a regional startup model.

case_results.description: Single-entity canonical traversal for Xapo. Tests retrieval for a fintech entity that may appear under abbreviated and full-name surface forms.
case_results.expected_shape: Rows with canonical_entity containing 'Xapo', claims grouped under a single canonical entry point regardless of surface-form variation.
failure_modes: canonical_rows empty — Xapo not in structured catalog or alignment failed
cluster_rows returns zero results — entity not mentioned in unstructured source
multiple canonical_entity values — duplicate CanonicalEntity nodes

Xapo Bank obtained a banking licence in Gibraltar.
Xapo partnered with Visa for its debit card.
WCG provided regulatory oversight for Xapo.

case_results.description: Single-entity canonical traversal for Endeavor. Tests retrieval for a known entity present in the structured catalog and likely mentioned in unstructured sources.
case_results.expected_shape: Rows with canonical_entity containing 'Endeavor', at least one participating mention, and at least one associated claim.
failure_modes: canonical_rows empty — Endeavor not in structured catalog
lower_layer_rows shows zero claims — participation coverage gap

canonical_rows.claim_text: Endeavor selected 12 new high-impact entrepreneurs.
The IFC provided funding to Endeavor.
Endeavor Global expanded its network to Brazil and Argentina.
Endeavor launched an accelerator programme in Jordan.
Reid Hoffman joined the board of Endeavor.
Endeavor and MercadoLibre co-hosted an entrepreneurship summit.

case_results.description: Single-entity canonical traversal for Linda Rottenberg (Person). Tests retrieval for a named individual, verifying the person-entity path works symmetrically with org-entity cases.
case_results.expected_shape: Rows with canonical_entity containing 'Linda Rottenberg', entity_type='Person', claims where she appears as subject or object.
failure_modes: canonical_rows empty — Linda Rottenberg not in structured catalog
entity_type mismatch — mention clustered as Organization instead of Person
lower_layer_rows shows cluster with zero claims

canonical_rows.claim_text: Linda Rottenberg co-founded Endeavor in 1997.
Forbes named Linda Rottenberg an impact entrepreneur of the decade.
Linda Rottenberg authored 'Crazy Is a Compliment'.
Linda Rottenberg spoke at the World Economic Forum in Davos.

case_results.description: Fragmentation check for MercadoLibre. Compares the number of distinct clusters returned by cluster-name traversal vs. canonical traversal. MercadoLibre is a known candidate for entity-type splits (e.g., appearing as both Organization and Person clusters under the same name text).
case_results.expected_shape: Canonical traversal returns a single canonical_entity value. Cluster-name traversal may return multiple rows if fragmentation exists; fragmentation_detected=True is the expected failure signal.
failure_modes: fragmentation_detected=True — cluster-name returns more clusters than canonical
canonical_rows empty — CanonicalEntity not present

case_results.description: Composite/list-valued claim case for Endeavor. Looks for claims where the subject or object slot contains a list-valued expression (joined by 'and', 'or', '/', etc.) that was resolved via the list-split match path. This exercises the claim_participation list-split fallback.
case_results.expected_shape: Rows where match_method='list_split' appear in canonical_rows or cluster_rows, or match_method='normalized_exact' for sub-tokens. If no list-split edges exist for this entity, the case is informative rather than a failure.
failure_modes: match_method only shows raw_exact — list-split path was not exercised
canonical_rows empty — Endeavor not reachable via canonical path

case_results.description: Canonical-traversal vs. cluster-name-traversal comparison for Xapo. Records the claim counts and cluster counts from both paths so that the delta can be tracked as a regression metric.
case_results.expected_shape: canonical_claim_count >= cluster_claim_count (canonical deduplicates) or both counts equal (no fragmentation). cluster_name_cluster_count >= canonical_cluster_count (fragmentation is additive). fragmentation_detected=False is the healthy state.
failure_modes: canonical_claim_count < cluster_claim_count — canonical path misses claims (alignment gap; investigate ALIGNED_WITH coverage for this entity)
fragmentation_detected=True — cluster-name path returns spurious extra clusters

case_results.description: Canonical-traversal vs. cluster-name-traversal comparison for Linda Rottenberg. Validates that Person-type entities also benefit from canonical deduplication.
case_results.expected_shape: canonical_claim_count >= cluster_claim_count. fragmentation_detected=False is the healthy state for a named individual.
failure_modes: fragmentation_detected=True — entity_type split produced both Person and Org clusters
canonical_rows empty — Linda Rottenberg not in structured catalog

pairwise_results.description: Pairwise canonical claim lookup for Amazon and eBay. Finds claims where both entities appear as participants (subject and/or object), verifying that pairwise canonical resolution works for two distinct organization entities.
pairwise_results.expected_shape: Zero or more rows each carrying both subject_canonical and object_canonical resolved to the correct canonical entities. Zero rows is acceptable if no cross-entity claims were extracted; what matters is the query returns without error and the canonical chain is traversable for both entities.
failure_modes: query returns error — ALIGNED_WITH or MEMBER_OF edges missing for one entity
result mixes unrelated entities — toLower CONTAINS filter too broad
